home.title: HaoHan SMP
home.desc2: HaoHan SMP is a vanilla server supporting both Java and Bedrock platforms, created by Ginn

about.title: WHAT IS HAOHAN SMP?
about.desc: HaoHan SMP is a multiplayer Minecraft survival server created by Ginn (the server owner). It was made as a chill place to play with friends after getting tired of 2y2c - an anarchy server!

faq.q1: What are the server specs, and is it enough to handle an SMP?
faq.a1: The server currently uses an Intel Xeon Platinum 8124M @ 3.00GHz CPU, which is enough to maintain a stable 20 TPS for up to 15 players. With 8GB of RAM, it can handle 20-25 players smoothly at around 19 TPS.
faq.a2: The server auto-backups every 2 hours, so you don't need to worry about losing your items or the world.
faq.q3: How do I join the server?
faq.a3: Answer the questions in the Sign Up section, then join the Discord to see the IP.
faq.q4: How can I donate to the server?
faq.a4: You can contact Ginn#2005 directly via MoMo, PayPal, or Cards.
faq.q5: Why can't I join the server even after signing up?
faq.a5: It's either because the mods haven't read your application yet, or your application was rejected!

signup.title: Sign Up - HaoHan SMP
signup.step3: Step 3: Click the star and select Vanilla Server
signup.step4: Step 4: Send the 4-digit code you received to Hao Bot#5483 (make sure to do this on Discord)
signup.step5: Step 5: Join the server you want and play 😎

donate.title: Donate - HaoHan SMP
donate.heading: Donate to the Server
